title: AGENT_CONTRACT.md updated with D015..D020 fixture purpose rules (SSOT mirror caught up)

evidence.ref: 2026-06-03 audit found D012 was last AGENT_CONTRACT edit

examples: Pure documentation refresh. No code change. Closes the SSOT-mirror gap: AGENT_CONTRACT.md is the human-readable mirror of agent-roles.riido.json + initial-agreement.md + fixture rules from D015..D020. If a dumb-agent reads AGENT_CONTRACT and follows it literally
it should be able to file a passing fixture.
